description: A flight en route to Boston (BOS) cannot land due to a thunderstorm. The flight operations controller must divert the flight to an alternate airport.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the pilot's report that they cannot land at BOS and review the designated alternate airports from the flight plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies Providence (PVD) as the primary alternate.

nodes.task_description: Check the weather and airport conditions at PVD to ensure it is suitable for landing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that PVD is open and has favorable weather.

nodes.task_description: Authorize the flight crew to divert to PVD and coordinate with the ground staff at PVD to handle the unexpected arrival.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the diversion and notifies the destination airport.
